product.highlights:
Dr. P Premium Level 7 Tape Adult Diapers is suitable for heavy incontinence users who are bedridden or with limited mobility. With 3x Skin Protection, it is soft, hypoallergenic-tested and breathable for skin health and comfort. The TurboDry Technology effectively distribute and absorb fluids, while the Anti-Leak Guards prevents leakage. The flexible fastening tape allows taping anywhere on the diaper and is easily adjustable.​

Dear Customer,

- Do take note that your parcel may arrive in 2 or more different parcels due to size limit by logistic partner.

title: Dr. P Professional XL 10s
detail_text: Dr. P Professional Adult Tape Diapers is suitable for heavy incontinence users who are bedridden or with limited mobility. With 2x Skin Protection, it is dermatologically tested and breathable for skin health and comfort. Features: 1) 2x Skin Protection: Dermalogically tested and Breathable DUAL Skin Protection that allows air to circulate for skin health and comfort. 2) QuickDry: Fast absorption core and dryness layer to evenly distribute fluids providing a dry and comfortable feeling. 3) Anti-Leak Guard: Prevents leakage to give comfort and confidence. 4) Adjustable fit zone: Ensure a flexible yet firm fit around waist and legs to give convenience and comfort feeling. 5) Odour Neutraliser: Enhance comfort by neutralizing unpleasant smells. 6) Wetness indicator: Color fades as the diaper gets wet. Recommended to do diaper change when 2/3 of the wetness indicator is faded. Size: M : 81 - 112cm L : 102 - 147cm XL : 127 - 157cm
detail_html:
Dr. P Professional Adult Tape Diapers is suitable for heavy incontinence users who are bedridden or with limited mobility. With 2x Skin Protection, it is dermatologically tested and breathable for skin health and comfort.

Features:

1) 2x Skin Protection: Dermalogically tested and Breathable DUAL Skin Protection that allows air to circulate for skin health and comfort.

2) QuickDry: Fast absorption core and dryness layer to evenly distribute fluids providing a dry and comfortable feeling.

3) Anti-Leak Guard: Prevents leakage to give comfort and confidence.

4) Adjustable fit zone: Ensure a flexible yet firm fit around waist and legs to give convenience and comfort feeling.

5) Odour Neutraliser: Enhance comfort by neutralizing unpleasant smells.

6) Wetness indicator: Color fades as the diaper gets wet. Recommended to do diaper change when 2/3 of the wetness indicator is faded.

Size:

M : 81 - 112cm

L : 102 - 147cm

XL : 127 - 157cm

brand.suggestion: More Adult Diapers & Incontinence from Dr.P

product.desc:
Dr. P Professional Adult Tape Diapers is suitable for heavy incontinence users who are bedridden or with limited mobility. With 2x Skin Protection, it is dermatologically tested and breathable for skin health and comfort.

Features:

1) 2x Skin Protection: Dermalogically tested and Breathable DUAL Skin Protection that allows air to circulate for skin health and comfort.

2) QuickDry: Fast absorption core and dryness layer to evenly distribute fluids providing a dry and comfortable feeling.

3) Anti-Leak Guard: Prevents leakage to give comfort and confidence.

4) Adjustable fit zone: Ensure a flexible yet firm fit around waist and legs to give convenience and comfort feeling.

5) Odour Neutraliser: Enhance comfort by neutralizing unpleasant smells.

6) Wetness indicator: Color fades as the diaper gets wet. Recommended to do diaper change when 2/3 of the wetness indicator is faded.

Size:

M : 81 - 112cm

L : 102 - 147cm

XL : 127 - 157cm

detail_html:
Audelacare™️ products are carefully designed with the everyday Singaporean in mind, ensuring that it can support an active and fast-moving lifestyle.

Audelacare™️ Adult Pants Diapers Product Features:

  • Our special wetness indicator that disappears upon contact with liquid, it makes it so simple to know when it is time to change the diaper.

  • Materials used are procured from the USA and Europe

  • One of the most absorbent on the market, due to the top quality SAP used and the special design features that we have added to our design.

Please visit Adult Pants Diapers for detail measurements

Materials (Adult Pants Diapers):

Padding: Super Absorbent Polyester

Diapers:

  • Top Sheet: Non-Woven Polyolefin
  • Absorbent: Paper, Pulp, Polymer
  • Back Sheet: Film Polyolefin
  • Elastic: Polyurethane
  • Construction: Styrene Elastomer | Synthetic Resin

Care Instructions

Do store in a dry and cool environment.

aiTexts: Audelacare Adult Pants Diapers are designed for active adults requiring heavy absorbency and reliable protection.
Made with premium materials sourced from the USA and Europe, they offer superior comfort and durability.
A special wetness indicator conveniently signals when it’s time for a change, enhancing ease of use.
The highly absorbent core uses top-quality SAP to lock in moisture and prevent leaks.
Their pant-style design and sensitive-skin-friendly materials make them suitable for everyday wear during busy lifestyles.

product.desc:
Material :PVC

Size :XS/S/L/M/L/XL

Type:Adult Diaper Cover

Color:As Shown

100% Brand New and High Quality!


Description:

High Elastic Waistband: Comfortable design, the incontinence cover pant is elastic and ensures a comfortable fit

Premium Material: Environmentally friendly PVC material, easy to clean, adults diaper cover provides reliable waterproof protection, and prevents leakage during use

Leakproof Design: The elastic trouser leg opening design of the soft diaper pants ensures good sealing, good elasticity, comfortable wearing, will not tighten the legs, and will not leave marks

Silent: Its silent of the adults protect underwear ensures concealment, so you can wear it with peace of mind without attracting attention

Application:Pull on underwear is suitable for various occasions, such as long distance travel, summer swimming, beach vacation, nursing or postoperative recovery, etc

Package Included: 1 ×Adult Diaper Cover

Note:

1. There is a 2-3% difference according to manual measurement. Please check the size carefully before you buy the item.

2. Please note that a slight color difference should be acceptable due to the light and screen.

page_json.description: Size :XS/S/L/M/L/XL Type:Adult Diaper Cover  100% Brand New and High Quality!  Color:As Shown  Material :PVC  Material :PVC Size :XS/S/L/M/L/XLType:Adult Diaper Cover Color:As Shown 100% Brand New and High Quality! Description: High Elastic Waistband: Comfortable design, the incontinence cover pant is elastic and ensures a comfortable fit Premium Material: Environmentally friendly PVC material, easy to clean, adults diaper cover provides reliable waterproof protection, and prevents leakage during use Leakproof Design: The elastic trouser leg opening design of the soft diaper pants ensures good sealing, good elasticity, comfortable wearing, will not tighten the legs, and will not leave marks Silent: Its silent of the adults protect underwear ensures concealment, so you can wear it with peace of mind without attracting attention Application:Pull on underwear is suitable for various occasions, such as long distance travel, summer swimming, beach vacation, nursing or postoperative recovery, etc  Package Included: 1 ×Adult Diaper Cover  Note: 1. There is a 2-3% difference according to manual measurement.  Please check the size carefully before you buy the item. 2. Please note that a slight color difference should be acceptable due to the light and screen.

title: MOLICARE Mobile M - 14's

title: Audelacare Adult Tape Diapers
detail_text: Audelacare™️ products are carefully designed with the everyday Singaporean in mind, ensuring that it can support an active and fast-moving lifestyle. Audelacare™️ Adult Tape Diapers Product Features: Our use of ADLs (Acquisition Distribution Layer) helps to ensure that the moisture dissipates quickly, ensuring a drier and more comfortable experience for you. Cloth-like stretch panels to help contour to different body sizes while providing a comfortable fit Special anti-leak cuffs, it provides a more fitting experience while reducing the possibility of leakage around the thigh area. The retention of the “8” shaped absorption pad that is popular has helped to maintain our commitment to preventing uncomfortable and embarrassing moments. Special velcro tape is easy to use and allows quick adjustment in case the fit was not right from the start Please visit Adult Tape Diapers for detail measurements Materials (Adult Tape Diapers): Padding: Super Absorbent Polyester Diapers: Top Sheet: Non-Woven Polyolefin Absorbent: Fluff Pulp, Polymer Leak Guard: Hydrophobic Polypropylene Velcro Tape: 80% Velcro | 20% Strong Glue Triple Textile Backsheet: Hydrophilic | Non-toxic Polypropylene | 100% Polyethylene Care Instructions Do store in a dry and cool environment.
detail_html:
Audelacare™️ products are carefully designed with the everyday Singaporean in mind, ensuring that it can support an active and fast-moving lifestyle.

 

Audelacare™️ Adult Tape Diapers Product Features:

 

  • Our use of ADLs (Acquisition Distribution Layer) helps to ensure that the moisture dissipates quickly, ensuring a drier and more comfortable experience for you.

 

  • Cloth-like stretch panels to help contour to different body sizes while providing a comfortable fit

 

  • Special anti-leak cuffs, it provides a more fitting experience while reducing the possibility of leakage around the thigh area.

 

  • The retention of the “8” shaped absorption pad that is popular has helped to maintain our commitment to preventing uncomfortable and embarrassing moments.

 

  • Special velcro tape is easy to use and allows quick adjustment in case the fit was not right from the start

 

Please visit Adult Tape Diapers for detail measurements

 

Materials (Adult Tape Diapers):

Padding: Super Absorbent Polyester  

Diapers:

  • Top Sheet: Non-Woven Polyolefin
  • Absorbent: Fluff Pulp, Polymer
  • Leak Guard: Hydrophobic Polypropylene
  • Velcro Tape: 80% Velcro | 20% Strong Glue
  • Triple Textile Backsheet: Hydrophilic | Non-toxic Polypropylene | 100% Polyethylene

Care Instructions

Do store in a dry and cool environment.

title: Pororo | Washable Incontinence Briefs for Paralyzed Bedridden Adults
detail_text: Disposable and Eco-friendly Although disposable, these diapers are eco-friendly, making them a responsible choice for adult care products. Washable Design The elderly adult diapers are designed for easy washing, making them convenient for daily use and reducing waste. Special for Paralyzed Bedridden These adult diapers are specifically designed for paralyzed bedridden individuals, providing comfort and dignity. Incontinence Protection The product offers excellent incontinence protection, ensuring dryness and comfort throughout the day. Adult Pull-Up Pants The adult pull-up pants design allows for easy wear and removal, enhancing user convenience and independence.

detail_text: AVANTDRY Product Description Experience reliable, everyday protection with AvantDry — designed for users who need dryness, comfort, and dependable leak protection throughout the day. Using our signature DrySeal™ Core Technology, AvantDry Core/Advanced/MaxGuard absorbs liquid rapidly and locks it deep inside, keeping the surface comfortable and dry for up to 6/8/12 hours. detail_html:
AVANTDRY

Product Description

Experience reliable, everyday protection with AvantDry — designed for users who need dryness, comfort, and dependable leak protection throughout the day.

Using our signature DrySeal™ Core Technology, AvantDry Core/Advanced/MaxGuard absorbs liquid rapidly and locks it deep inside, keeping the surface comfortable and dry for up to 6/8/12 hours.

The AirFlex™ breathable backsheet ensures airflow to reduce heat and moisture, while FlowGuard side leak barriers offer extra defence for side sleepers or mobile users.

Soft, gentle materials protect sensitive skin, suitable for elderly users, caregivers, and institutions looking for a dependable daily-use diaper.

Material Composition

Top Sheet: Soft hydrophilic non-woven

Core: Fluff pulp + SAP (From USA, Europe & Japan)

ADL: Embossed fast-spreading layer

Waistband: Elastic for snug fit

Technology Features

DrySeal™ – Rapid absorption & dryness (Rapid Absorption Core Technology)

AirFlex™ – Breathable comfort layer (Breathable Back Sheet keeps skin cool)

FlowGuard – Dual leak protection (Dual Leak Barriers for side-leak protection)

DermaSoft - Skin-Friendly Top Sheet (Breathable & Comfortable Top Sheet suitable for daily use)

OdourShield - Neutralising Odour Control

Wetness Indicator for easy monitoring

Secure Refastenable Tapes

Hypoallergenic & Skin-Friendly
